ground_truth.title: Tuition and Fees
ground_truth.main_content:
Tuition is set annually by the Florida Legislature, with additional local and university fees set by the Florida State University Board of Trustees and the Florida Board of Governors. You can find regulatory references for tuition and fee assessment through:

* Title XLVIII, Chapter 1009, Part II of Florida's Statutes
* BOG Regulation 7.001 and 7.003 of the State University System of Florida Board of Governors
* Chapter FSU-2.02421 Tuition and Fee Assessment and Refunds of Florida State University Regulations

The following rate tables apply to the 2025-2026 academic year and are subject to change based on legislative and internal policy changes.

Some courses are assessed additional costs for online fees, labs, materials and supplies, and general cost recovery. For a full list of these courses and costs, download the Additional Cost File here.

Tuition Rates

Traditional Academic Programs

Campus/Program	Career	In-State Rate per credit hour	Out-of-State Rate per credit hour	Tuition Breakdown PDF
Main Campus	Undergraduate	$215.55	$771.66	Download PDF
Main Campus	Graduate	$479.32	$1,173.86	Download PDF
Panama City Campus	Undergraduate	$180.49	$736.60	Download PDF
Panama City Campus	Graduate	$444.26	$1,138.80	Download PDF
Sarasota Campus	Undergraduate	$182.30	$738.41	Download PDF
Sarasota Campus	Graduate	$446.07	$1,140.61	Download PDF
Distance Learning*	Undergraduate	$180.49	$736.60	Download PDF
Distance Learning*	Graduate	$444.26	$1,138.80	Download PDF
College of Law - Main	J.D./LL.M./J.M.	$688.11	$1,421.89	Download PDF
College of Law - Online	J.M. / LL.M.	$653.05	$1,386.83	Download PDF
Republic of Panama	Undergraduate	$300.00	$300.00	Fee Breakdown
Republic of Panama	Graduate	$400.00	$400.00	Fee Breakdown

*Distance Learning academic programs are offered through academic departments as fully-online programs of study. These rates are unique to programs offered fully online through the Office of Distance Learning, not programs which are generally offered online separate from a distance learning academic program. These rates do not include pricing for courses coded non-fundable or market rate, which are variable based on academic program of study.

For more information on Distance Learning Academic Programs, please visit the Distance Learning webpage.

To learn more about graduate admissions and graduate funding opportunities, please visit the Graduate Admissions webpage.

Special Medical Programs

Campus/Program	Cohort	In-State Rate per semester	Out-of-State Rate per semester	Tuition Breakdown PDF
Nurse Anesthesia - Panama City	All Cohorts	$9,500.44	$9,500.44	Download PDF
Campus/Program	Cohort	In-State Rate Per Year	Out-of-State Rate Per Year	Tuition Breakdown PDF
Physician Assistant - Main Campus	All Cohorts	$31,463.04	$43,013.04	Download PDF

College of Medicine

Campus/Program	Cohort	In-State Rate	Out-of-State Rate	Tuition Breakdown PDF
Medicine - Main	Year 1 (>6 Hours)	$8,536.86 per semester	$21,205.63 per semester	Download PDF
Medicine - Main	Year 2 (>6 Hours)	$12,805.30 per semester	$31,808.45 per semester	Download PDF
Medicine - Main	Year 3&4 (>6 Hours)	$8,536.87 per semester	$21,205.63 per semester	Download PDF
Medicine - Main	All Years (<6 Hours)	$479.32 per credit hour	$1,173.86 per credit hour	Download PDF

with: Tuition is set annually by the Florida Legislature, with additional local and university fees set by the Florida State University Board of Trustees and the Florida Board of Governors.
The following rate tables apply to the 2025-2026 academic year and are subject to change based on legislative and internal policy changes.
Main Campus Undergraduate: In-State Rate per credit hour $215.55, Out-of-State Rate per credit hour $771.66
Some courses are assessed additional costs for online fees, labs, materials and supplies, and general cost recovery.
All Media Production Majors: Media Production Equipment Fee $113.00 per semester
